title: Meranthera corynocephala
uses: Meranthera corynocephala is reportedly used in traditional medicine in various regions, particularly in Africa and Asia. It is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may aid in treating skin conditions and wounds. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may aid in reducing pain and inflammation, as well as protecting against oxidative stress.
